sentences.arabic: اللُّغَةُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ لُغَةٌ بَلِيغَةٌ وَوَاسِعَةٌ جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Arapski jezik je vrlo rječit i opsežan.
sentences.translationEn: The Arabic language is very eloquent and vast.

sentences.arabic: اسْتَفَادَ الْأَدَبَاءُ مِنْ جَمَالِ الْقُرْآنِ الْكَرِيمِ فِي كِتَابَاتِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Književnici su koristili ljepotu Časnog Kur'ana u svojim spisima.
sentences.translationEn: Writers benefited from the beauty of the Holy Quran in their writings.

sentences.arabic: نَجِدُ الْفَصَاحَةَ فِي الْخُطَبِ وَالرَّسَائِلِ الْقَدِيمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Rječitost nalazimo u starim govorima i poslanicama.
sentences.translationEn: We find eloquence in ancient speeches and letters.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ الْكَاتِبُ كَلِمَاتٍ قَوِيَّةً لِلتَّعْبِيرِ عَنِ الْحَقِيقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Pisac koristi snažne riječi da izrazi istinu.
sentences.translationEn: The writer uses powerful words to express the truth.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا الْأُسْلُوبُ يَجْعَلُ الْقَارِئَ يُفَكِّرُ عَمِيقًا.
sentences.translation: Ovaj stil navodi čitaoca na duboko razmišljanje.
sentences.translationEn: This style makes the reader think deeply.
